title: Yyaish
compiled_truth: Yyaish is an external contact at [Exchange](companies/exchange). Over the corpus period (1999-12-29 to 2001-05-21), Yyaish sent 11 and received 41 emails, totalling 52 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (11), [Teiglandl](people/teiglandl-sullcrom) (2), [Janice R Moore](people/janice-r-moore) (2), [Lpeddic](people/lpeddic-alleghenyenergy) (2), [Gilbergd](people/gilbergd-sullcrom) (2).
